name: uyla ctrl
description: "uyla ctrl" another wooting 80he clickpack as per usual - the specifications of my wooting - PBR ABS Plastic Case - Double Shot PBT Keycaps - Lekker V2 L60 Linear Switches - pros and cons of my clickpack - pros - performs well in spams in my opinion - one of my better sounding / higher quality clickpacks - cons - i think it sounds quite similar other clickpacks ive made in the past - some of the hardclicks are way too loud / strong - lmk about any other issues regarding the clickpack so i can (maybe) fix it
